commands.review_summary:
The branch switches the stable gateway to an npm-shrinkwrapped build path, keeps source fallback, updates pin/CI automation and docs, and adds build/performance metering.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a packaging-default and CI/release automation PR, not a reported runtime bug. The relevant proof is package/build/promotion validation rather than a failing reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer review is needed for the default packaging policy, npm trust boundary, stacked base, and release automation changes; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.
